de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class OutputStreamProofSaver

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.OutputStreamProofSaver
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ProofSaver

    public class OutputStreamProofSaver
extends java.lang.Object
    Saves a proof to a given OutputStream.

      • getJavaSourceLocation

        public static java.io.File getJavaSourceLocation(Proof proof)
        Extracts java source directory from Proof.header(), if it exists.
        Parameters:
        proof - the Proof
        Returns:
        the location of the java source code or null if no such exists

      • writeLog

        Write users and KeY versions to buffer.
        Returns:
        a buffer containing user and KeY version.

      • node2Proof

        public void node2Proof(Node node,
                       java.lang.Appendable ps)
                throws java.io.IOException
        Print applied rule(s) for a proof node and its decendants into the passed writer such that in can be loaded again as a proof.
        Parameters:
        node - the proof node from which to be printed
        ps - the writer in which the rule(s) is/are printed
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - an exception thrown when printing fails
